events.title: Mega Raichu X/Y Raid Day
events.description: New and returning Trainers are always welcome! Super Mega Raids require shields to be broken by Mega-Evolved Pokémon, so please come prepared. Primal Reversions do NOT count toward shield breaking.

events.title: Solgaleo Raid Hour
events.description: Join us for Raid Hour and your chance to battle—and possibly catch—a Shiny Solgaleo!

events.title: Gigantamax Rillaboom Max Battle Day
events.description: Recommended teams: Dynamax Blissey or Gigantamax Charizard as tanks. Gigantamax Charizard or Cinderace as attackers.
